key_cases_mentioned: Trolley wire / Amtrak Acela current pickup (consulting case, copper tensile testing)
Beer can / Coke can ironing (40% of world aluminum production)
Upstate New York brewery consulting job, 1976-77 (beer keg failure, second-largest US brewery)
Percy Bridgman tetrahedral anvil press (Nobel Prize, hydrostatic suppression of fracture)
Deep-mine rock plasticity at 10,000 ft (diamond mines)
LNG tanker tail-shaft fatigue failure, 1985 (Philippine Sea)
Alcoa Davenport rolling mill thickness variation (Julie's LFM thesis)
key_concepts_introduced: Stress tensor: principal vs. deviatoric stresses
P/2Y vs. Δ master plot consolidating 48 processes into 7
Friction regimes by Δ (Δ≤1 friction-dominated; Δ≈10 friction-negligible)
textbooks_referenced: Hosford & Caddell, Metal Forming: Mechanics and Metallurgy
